title: Itachi Custom Menu
description: Itachi Uchiha themed custom Minecraft menu. Made By Berkay3435TR.✨
body:
# Itachi Custom Menu.

- This resource pack customizes the Minecraft main menu, adding a unique Itachi Uchiha theme🩸. It replaces the default Minecraft Java Edition title with a custom design ✨, updates the background and menu buttons , and changes the appearance of the settings interface for a darker look.

- In-game appearance
